events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr turns 86 on July 7th, a legend in British music history

angles.name: Beatles Legacy
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86, a legend in British music history, as the drummer for one of the most influential bands of all time, The Beatles, he would be 86 years old today

events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Brian May turns 74 on July 19th, known for his iconic guitar riffs in Queen

angles.name: Queen Icon
angles.copy: Brian May turns 74, the legendary guitarist of Queen, known for his iconic riffs and hits like Bohemian Rhapsody, he would be 74 years old today

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Mick Jagger turns 83 on July 26th, the Rolling Stones' iconic frontman

angles.name: Rolling Stones Legend
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 83, the charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, one of the most influential rock bands of all time, he would be 83 years old today

events.title: MTV Launches
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1st, 1981, with the first video being Buggles - Video Killed The Radio Star

angles.name: Music Television
angles.copy: On August 1st, 1981, MTV launched, revolutionizing the music industry with its 24-hour music video format, the first video to air was Buggles - Video Killed The Radio Star

events.title: Oasis release Definately Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album Definately Maybe on August 5th, 1994

angles.name: Britpop Icons
angles.copy: On August 5th, 1994, Oasis released their debut album Definately Maybe, marking the beginning of the Britpop era and cementing their status as one of the most influential bands of the 90s

events.title: Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place from August 15th to 18th, 1969

angles.name: Peace and Music
angles.copy: The Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15th to 18th, 1969, featuring legendary performances and promoting peace and unity

events.title: Anniversary Of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the King of Rock and Roll, passed away on August 16th, 1977

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: On August 16th, 1977, the world lost the one and only Elvis Presley, a music icon who would have been 91 years old today, leaving behind a legacy that continues to inspire and influence artists to this day

events.title: Tupac Shakur Shot
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas on September 1st, 1996

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: On September 1st, 1996, Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in Las Vegas, a devastating loss for the music world, he would have been 50 years old today

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix' Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 2nd, 1970

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: On September 2nd, 1970, the world lost Jimi Hendrix, a guitar legend and iconic figure in rock music, he would have been 83 years old today

events.title: Beatles Release Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album Abbey Road on September 4th, 1969

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: On September 4th, 1969, The Beatles released Abbey Road, one of the most influential albums in music history, featuring iconic tracks like Come Together and Here Comes the Sun

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the lead singer of The Pretenders, turns 75 on September 7th

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde turns 75, the iconic lead singer of The Pretenders, known for hits like Brass in Pocket and Back on the Chain Gang, she would be 75 years old today

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the lead singer of Oasis, turns 54 on September 21st

angles.name: Oasis Frontman
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher turns 54, the charismatic frontman of Oasis, known for his distinctive voice and style, he would be 54 years old today

events.title: John Lennon Releases Imagine
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album Imagine on October 1st, 1971

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: On October 1st, 1971, John Lennon released Imagine, a powerful and thought-provoking album featuring the iconic title track, a plea for peace and unity

events.title: Apple Releases the First iPod
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod on October 3rd, 2001

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: On October 3rd, 2001, Apple released the first iPod, revolutionizing the music industry and changing the way we listen to music

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day

angles.name: Bond Legacy
angles.copy: October 5th is James Bond Day, a celebration of the iconic spy who has been thrilling audiences for decades, from Sean Connery to Daniel Craig

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, the legendary musician and songwriter, would have been 86 on October 9th

angles.name: Lennon Legacy
angles.copy: John Lennon would have been 86, a tribute to the legendary musician and songwriter, known for his iconic music and message of peace and love
